scope: Validates #4 recall_hybrid bounded-CTE rewrite (with REVIEW_0.9 C2 ef_search-floor fix) does not regress ranking vs the current full-n recall_hybrid. Closes REVIEW_0.9 C1.

corpus.source: MuSiQue controlled corpus, gold = supporting_titles->lesson ids

note: Quality parity established at 2500 rows (top-10 Jaccard=1.00). The dramatic O(n) latency win (full-n times out 12-21s) manifests at ~5k+ rows; at 2500 the full-n path still returns (39ms) so the latency delta here is modest (13 vs 39ms) — the gate's purpose is the QUALITY parity, which is confirmed. C2 ef_search-floor fix (vec LIMIT GREATEST(k*4,_ef_search)) applied. Host-executed by orchestrator per modified release fork-flow.
verification: exp5_recall_c1.py on agency_v3 / pgmnemo 0.8.3 engine; recall_hybrid full-n vs bounded-CTE replication with C2 fix.
